title: Generating novel scientific hypotheses with Co-Scientist
summary: Google DeepMind developed Co-Scientist, a Gemini-based multi-agent AI system that iteratively generates, debates, and evolves novel hypotheses for complex scientific problems. The system aims to accelerate scientific breakthroughs by partnering with researchers to overcome information overload and hypothesis generation bottlenecks.
